# Data Interfaces — Manifest

**Family:** {family}
**Generated by:** AI-DFE
**Generated on:** {ISO-8601}

> Human-readable manifest of every file in `{family}-ws/data/`. The machine-readable equivalent is `REGISTRY.json` (which consumers read first). This manifest is for people and for the `ICG__` integrity check (every `.json` here has a schema + an entry).

## Per-Package Data (Layer 1)

| File | Package | Schema | Status |
|------|---------|--------|--------|
| `{pkg}-data.json` | ai-{pkg} | `.kiro/{family}/ai-{pkg}-rule-details/data-schema/{pkg}-data.schema.json` | {fresh\|stale\|not-run} |
| … | … | … | … |

## Demand-Driven Outputs (Layer 2)

| File | Consumer | Schema (DFE-owned) | Demand |
|------|----------|--------------------|--------|
| `{name}.json` | {consumer} | `{family}-ws/data/{name}.schema.json` | `demands/{name}.demand.md` |
| … | … | … | … |

## DFE-Owned Schemas

| Schema | Validates |
|--------|-----------|
| `{name}.schema.json` | the `{name}.json` demand output |

## Cross-Family (master mode only)

| Family | Registry | Files |
|--------|----------|-------|
| {other} | `{other}-ws/data/REGISTRY.json` | {file list} |

---

*Producer: AI-DFE (sole writer). Consumers read via `REGISTRY.json`. This manifest is regenerated on every distribute pass.*
